releases.label: PR3 (Planck 2018)
releases.summary: Planck 2018 legacy release — final full-mission LFI/HFI temperature and polarization maps and the legacy cosmological parameter products, served from the ESA Planck Legacy Archive (mirrored at IRSA)

releases.label: PR4 / NPIPE
releases.summary: Final release (July 2020) — joint NPIPE re-analysis of LFI and HFI data; compared with PR3, improved CMB polarisation with reduced noise and systematics at all angular scales and better cross-frequency consistency; at the Planck Legacy Archive
